description: Woodpecker is cold email software that sends personalized outreach at scale with built-in verification and warm-up to protect deliverability for sales teams and agencies.
tagline: Cold email for sales and agencies
overview: Woodpecker sends personalized cold email at scale and protects deliverability with email verification, automated warm-up, and adaptive sending, plus CRM integrations.
what_is: Woodpecker is a cold email tool built for B2B outreach and lead generation. It sends personalized emails to prospects while working to keep messages out of spam, combining sending, warm-up, and verification in one platform so teams do not need separate tools for each.

It works best for sales teams and agencies running cold email campaigns to win new clients. After connecting a domain and warming up the inbox, campaigns can start quickly, and agencies can manage multiple client campaigns from one place.

Woodpecker fits the sales stack by integrating with email services and CRMs. It is built for one-to-one personalized outreach rather than mass marketing or transactional email, which helps keep campaigns effective without overwhelming recipients.
